data.description:
## Description
Implement the duplication adapter behind the analyzer interface by shelling out to `jscpd` (external CLI, JSON reporter) for copy/paste clone stats. Populates AnalyzerResult.duplication (clone count / duplicated-lines fraction).

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Adapter shells to jscpd over the scan root, parses the JSON report (statistics), returns clone count + duplication ratio.
- [ ] jscpd not on PATH / error -> Unavailable("jscpd not available"), not a crash and not zeros.
- [ ] Deterministic; no network.

## Verification
- [ ] Unit tests with a monkeypatched runner seam (no jscpd required in CI).
- [ ] Integration test (skipped if jscpd absent) over a fixture with a known clone.

## Dependencies: Children 1, 2, 3
## Files likely touched: src/rebar/metrics/adapters/jscpd_dup.py (new), tests/unit/metrics/test_jscpd_dup.py (new)
## Estimated scope: M (2 files)
data.title: Duplication analyzer adapter via jscpd (clone detection, deterministic shell-out)
